name: (Totally not) Cursed Collars - Spoils of War
description:
You had finally done it, you had bested the Palace of Pleasure and come out on top. With the infamous dungeon in ruins, you walked into the treasure room. Before you were riches and plunder galore! But as you looted and pillaged, you couldn't help but feel your attention getting ensnared by three ornate collars...

Put them on? Ignore them? Try to destroy them (not recommended)? The choice is yours, brave hero...

CONTENT WARNING!: Bimbofication, hypnosis, transformation, breeding, brainwashing, corruption, force-fem. If none of these appeal to you, steer clear! Also, this is pure smut. If you came here for a coherent story, try one of my other bots.
creator: SkelpieOverworld
